note: SG water attacker; pellets = hits (hitsPerShot 10), so pellet-count triggers map to hitCount. S1: hitting the target with 80 pellets (hitCount:80, re-triggers every ~8 shots -> effectively permanent in sustained fire) grants Attack Damage 72%; Hit Rate 98.18% kept for fidelity (inert). 'Pellet count fixed at 1' + 'Gains Pierce' are NOT modeled: the engine fires a fixed 10 hits/shot and Pierce is inert on a single boss, so the pellet-consolidation mechanic can't be expressed - left as-is and flagged uncertain (net effect on a lone boss is roughly a wash but genuinely unclear). S1 second block (160 pellets -> Expand Pierce range 200%) omitted: pierce is inert on a single boss. S2: passive Pierce Damage 55.08% kept (inert, fidelity); the 'only during Full Burst' ATK 75.24% (which the parser dropped as an unsupported trigger) is modeled on fullBurstEnter for 10s (~full-burst length); Hit Rate 40.68% kept for fidelity (inert). Burst: Attack Speed 65% and ATK 88.12% kept; 'Number of pellets +5 for 15s' can't be expressed directly, so per guidance it is approximated as normalAttackPct +50% (5 extra pellets on a base of 10 = +50% normal-attack output) for 15s - note this ignores any interaction with the S1 pellet-fixed-at-1 state. All numbers verbatim from skill text.
